{{Quote|Show yourself, cowards! Match me in my use of the Force!|Silus|<ref name="Marked">{{Tales|24|Marked}}</ref>}}
'''Silus''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Drovian]]. Strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Silus competed in pit fights on an unknown [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]. His strength made him almost unbeatable, and his expressed goal was to make enough [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to get off the planet. [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] recognized his power and dispatched [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] to deliver a message. When Sidious ordered Silus to kill Maul and take his place at the foot of the Dark Lord, Silus and Maul dueled. Despite his skills, and a dampening field that prevented Maul from using his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Silus was defeated and beheaded by the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]].
